[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011101 4
1 01111000 4
2 11011110 6
3 00111111 6
4 01111101 6
5 11111111 a
6 10101111 6
7 01111111 7

01 10 00010111 4
12 21 01100101 4
23 32 10100100 3
34 43 11110011 6
45 54 01011010 4
56 65 00011010 3
67 76 11000010 3
70 07 10100111 5

13 31 11000001 3
24 42 01010111 5
35 53 10101001 4
46 64 01000000 1
57 75 11011000 4
60 06 01100101 4
71 17 10110000 3

36 63 10110011 5
47 74 10000010 2
50 05 01111111 7 match 7
61 16 01110010 4
72 27 11010101 5

26 62 00010111 4
37 73 01110001 4
